response.justification: Highly experienced fullstack engineer (15+ years) with strong TypeScript/Node.js/React background, current AI-agent and MCP work at re:cinq directly matching the AI agent development requirement, and a documented TDD/testing craftsmanship focus. Stack alignment is strong on primary technologies but has gaps on Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin specifically. Solid candidate worth interviewing to validate framework-specific depth.
strengths: Current hands-on AI agent and MCP code generator experience at re:cinq
Deep fullstack track record with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes
Strong testing/TDD background — workshops, fluent-asserts library, trial test runner
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in resume
No mention of Kotlin; Java exposure is older (robotic arms, NI era)
Vitest and Playwright not explicitly cited; PostgreSQL not mentioned
